mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product (merchant_id, product_name, description, price, original_price, image_url, category, status, sort_order, is_hot, is_recommend, sales_count, view_count, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{merchantId}, #{productName}, #{description}, #{price}, #{originalPrice}, #{imageUrl}, #{category}, #{status}, #{sortOrder}, #{isHot}, #{isRecommend}, #{salesCount}, #{viewCount}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE product SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE product SET sales_count = sales_count + #{count}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE product SET view_count = view_count + #{count}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM product WHERE merchant_id = #{merchantId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM product WHERE merchant_id = #{merchantId} AND status = #{status} ORDER BY create_time DESC
